technology.title: China ‘Madman of Science’ believes budget space travel is viable after low-cost rocket launch
technology.summary: An innovator in China has successfully launched a self-developed low-cost rocket, proving the feasibility of budget space exploration to the world. In February, the 12m Shenzhen Pioneer rocket made local history in China’s remote northeastern Qinghai province, reaching a record altitude of 3,700m and setting a new regional benchmark for liquid rocket launches. Built by a five-person team led by 31-year-old Lu Yulong, the rocket took just 15 days to build in Shenzhen. Lu, a self-taught innovator...

briefing.news_focus: An innovator in China has successfully launched a self-developed low-cost rocket, proving the feasibility of budget space exploration to the world. In February, the 12m Shenzhen Pioneer rocket made local history in China’s remote northeastern Qinghai province, reaching a record altitude of 3,700m and setting a new regional benchmark for liquid rocket launches. Built by a five-person team led by 31-year-old Lu Yulong, the rocket took just 15 days to build in Shenzhen. Lu, a self-taught innovator...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國創新者盧宇龍領導的五人團隊成功發射了一枚自製的低成本火箭，證明了預算太空探索的可行性。這枚名為深圳先鋒的火箭於2月份在中國偏遠的青海省創下了3700米的高度紀錄，並為液體火箭發射設定了新的區域基準。該火箭在深圳僅花了15天建造完成，顯示出中國在太空技術上的進步。
briefing.background: 隨著太空探索的商業化趨勢日益明顯，許多國家和企業都在尋求降低太空任務的成本。中國在過去幾年中加大了對太空技術的投資，並積極發展自主研發的火箭技術。這一背景下，低成本火箭的成功發射不僅展示了中國在太空領域的技術進步，也可能吸引更多的私人資本進入太空探索市場，促進相關產業的發展。
briefing.analysis: 盧宇龍的成功發射可能會引發中國內部對於太空探索的更大關注，並激勵其他創新者進一步探索低成本解決方案。這一事件也可能對國際太空市場產生影響，尤其是在商業太空旅行和衛星發射服務方面。隨著中國在太空技術上逐漸崛起，其他國家可能會重新評估其在太空探索中的策略和投資。此外，這一成就也可能引起國際社會對中國太空計畫的關注，特別是在技術轉移和國際合作方面的潛在機會與挑戰。

technology.title: AI helped Shenzhen judges handle cases 50% faster. Is this the future for China?
technology.summary: Judges in Shenzhen – China’s Silicon Valley – processed 50 per cent more cases last year than in 2024 with the help of a pilot system powered by AI technology, according to the city’s Intermediate People’s Court. It said the artificial intelligence-driven system would now be introduced in the courts of dozens more Chinese cities. In a social media post on Tuesday, the Shenzhen Intermediate People’s Court said each judge in the city had handled an average of 744 cases in 2025 – up by 249 cases...

briefing.news_focus: Judges in Shenzhen – China’s Silicon Valley – processed 50 per cent more cases last year than in 2024 with the help of a pilot system powered by AI technology, according to the city’s Intermediate People’s Court. It said the artificial intelligence-driven system would now be introduced in the courts of dozens more Chinese cities. In a social media post on Tuesday, the Shenzhen Intermediate People’s Court said each judge in the city had handled an average of 744 cases in 2025 – up by 249 cases...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 深圳市中級人民法院報告指出，該市法官在2025年利用人工智慧技術的試點系統，案件處理速度提升了50%。每位法官平均處理744件案件，較2024年增加249件。該法院計劃在更多中國城市推廣這一人工智慧驅動的系統，顯示出科技在法律領域的應用潛力。
briefing.background: 深圳被譽為中國的矽谷，擁有強大的科技創新能力。隨著人工智慧技術的迅速發展，各行各業都在探索其應用潛力，尤其是在法律和司法系統中。中國政府積極推動數字化轉型，並將人工智慧視為提升行政效率的重要工具。深圳的這一試點計劃不僅反映了地方政府的創新實踐，也可能成為全國範圍內的政策示範，影響中國未來的司法運作模式。
briefing.analysis: 深圳法官利用人工智慧系統提高案件處理效率，顯示出科技在司法領域的潛在變革。這一進展可能會引發其他城市和地區的模仿，促進全國範圍內的司法改革。支持者認為，這將提升法律服務的效率和公平性，減少法官的工作壓力。然而，批評者可能會擔心人工智慧在法律決策中的應用可能導致的偏見和透明度問題。此外，這一做法也可能引發對於數據隱私和安全性的討論，特別是在涉及敏感案件的情況下。整體而言，深圳的這一舉措可能成為中國司法系統未來發展的重要指標。

technology.title: Motorola’s India lawsuit could make platforms police speech faster
technology.summary: The American phonemaker's Indian arm has named X, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, Google, and Meta in a lawsuit asking to take down existing and future “defamatory” content.

briefing.news_focus: The American phonemaker's Indian arm has named X, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, Google, and Meta in a lawsuit asking to take down existing and future “defamatory” content.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國手機製造商摩托羅拉在印度提起訴訟，針對社交媒體平台X、YouTube、Instagram、Facebook、Threads、Google及Meta，要求這些平台刪除現有及未來的「誹謗」內容。此舉可能促使這些平台加速監管用戶言論，影響社交媒體的內容管理政策。
briefing.background: 摩托羅拉在印度的法律行動反映了當地對於網路言論的日益關注。隨著社交媒體的普及，誹謗和不實信息的問題愈發嚴重，企業和個人都可能受到影響。印度政府也在推動更嚴格的網路監管政策，要求平台對於用戶生成內容負更多責任。這一訴訟可能成為未來類似案件的先例，促使其他企業採取類似行動以保護自身聲譽。
briefing.analysis: 摩托羅拉的訴訟可能會引發社交媒體平台在內容管理上的重大變化。若法院支持摩托羅拉的要求，這將迫使平台在監控和刪除內容方面加快步伐，可能導致用戶言論自由受到限制。另一方面，這也可能引發平台與用戶之間的信任危機，因為用戶可能會擔心自己的言論被隨意刪除。此外，這一訴訟可能影響其他企業的行為，促使它們也採取法律手段來維護自身利益，進一步加劇平台的監管壓力。

politics.title: China says to ignore US sanctions even as Trump visit nears
politics.summary: China ordered companies to ignore US sanctions against five oil refiners accused of buying Iranian crude, an unprecedented pushback against American financial measures less than two weeks before a presidential summit. The US action “violates international law and the basic norms of international relations”, China’s Ministry of Commerce said on Saturday. The sanctions cover a refinery in Dalian owned by Shanghai-listed Hengli Petrochemical, along with four independent “teapot” refineries –...

briefing.news_focus: China ordered companies to ignore US sanctions against five oil refiners accused of buying Iranian crude, an unprecedented pushback against American financial measures less than two weeks before a presidential summit. The US action “violates international law and the basic norms of international relations”, China’s Ministry of Commerce said on Saturday. The sanctions cover a refinery in Dalian owned by Shanghai-listed Hengli Petrochemical, along with four independent “teapot” refineries –...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國政府命令國內企業無視美國對五家石油煉油廠的制裁，這些煉油廠被指控購買伊朗原油。中國商務部表示，美國的制裁行為違反國際法及國際關係基本準則，這一舉措是在特朗普總統訪問前的兩週內發出的，顯示出中國對美國金融措施的強烈反擊。
briefing.background: 美國對伊朗的制裁政策已經持續多年，主要是針對伊朗的核計劃及其在中東的影響力。此次制裁針對的五家煉油廠中，包括了大連的恒力石化和四家獨立的“茶壺”煉油廠，這些企業在中國的能源供應鏈中扮演著重要角色。中國作為全球最大的石油進口國之一，對伊朗原油的需求仍然強勁，這使得中國在面對美國制裁時，必須考量其能源安全與國際貿易的平衡。
briefing.analysis: 中國對美國制裁的強烈反應顯示出其在國際貿易中維護自身利益的決心。中國商務部的聲明不僅是對美國政策的反擊，也是對國內企業的一種支持，鼓勵他們繼續與伊朗進行貿易。這一行動可能會引發美國進一步的制裁措施，並加劇中美之間的緊張關係。隨著特朗普訪問的臨近，中國的這一決策可能會成為雙方談判中的一個重要議題，影響未來的外交動態。各方可能會在貿易、能源安全及國際法的解釋上展開激烈的討論。

politics.title: Israel-Iran war updates: Trump announces 'Project Freedom' to help stranded ships out of Strait of Hormuz
politics.summary: Amid Trump's announcement, Ebrahim Azizi, head of the national security commission in Iran's parliament, said that any U.S. action in Strait of Hormuz would be a breach of ceasefire

briefing.news_focus: Amid Trump's announcement, Ebrahim Azizi, head of the national security commission in Iran's parliament, said that any U.S. action in Strait of Hormuz would be a breach of ceasefire
briefing.news_focus_zh: 特朗普宣布啟動名為「自由計畫」的行動，旨在協助被困於霍爾木茲海峽的船隻。此舉引起伊朗國會國家安全委員會主席艾布拉欣·阿齊齊的強烈反對，他表示任何美國在霍爾木茲海峽的行動都將違反停火協議。
briefing.background: 霍爾木茲海峽是全球最重要的石油運輸通道之一，近年來因美伊緊張關係而成為衝突焦點。美國與伊朗之間的對抗加劇，特別是在特朗普政府期間，雙方在該地區的軍事行動與言辭交鋒頻繁。特朗普的「自由計畫」意在強化美國在該地區的影響力，並保障航運安全，然而伊朗則強烈反對外國軍事介入，認為這將威脅到其國家安全與主權。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普的「自由計畫」意在提升美國在霍爾木茲海峽的軍事存在，這可能會引發伊朗的強烈反應。根據參考報導，伊朗國會官員已明言美國的行動將被視為對停火協議的違反，顯示出雙方在該地區的緊張局勢可能進一步升級。美國希望通過此計畫來保護國際航運，但伊朗則可能會視此為挑釁，進一步加劇地緣政治緊張。此外，參考報導1中提到特朗普的具體行動計畫，強調了美國的主動性，而其他報導則未涉及具體細節，這反映出不同媒體對事件的關注重點有所不同。

supporting_titles: Iran warns US to stay out of Hormuz after Trump says US will ‘guide’ ships
US airlines help stranded passengers as Spirit closes
supporting_summaries: President Trump said the US will begin Project Freedom on Monday to guide stranded ships out of the Strait of Hormuz.

politics.title: Young Americans have soured on Trump | Steven Greenhouse
politics.summary: The president’s approval rating with those under 30 has plummeted as he has failed to deliver on promise after promise Republicans rejoiced when far more young voters than expected backed Donald Trump in 2024, with many of them moved by Trump’s grandiose promises, such as his vow to “ build the greatest economy in the history of the world”. But Republicans should be alarmed that so many 18- to 29-year-olds have soured on Trump – his approval rating with that group has sunk from 48% in January 2025 to between just 25% and 33% in recent months , according to polls by YouGov/the Economist. It shouldn’t be a surprise that millions of young Americans have turned against Trump, considering that he has failed to deliver on so many promises, most notably his vow to reduce prices on day one . For young people, inflation is the No 1 economic issue , far outpacing other issues, and they very much wanted Trump to focus on affordability, but Trump has focused on everything but affordability. He’s focused instead on his glitzy, $400m ballroom , his war against Iran (which has increased gas prices ), and his tariff wars (which have increased overall inflation). In bad news for Republicans, 78% of Americans under age 30 disapprove of how Trump is handling inflation. Steven Greenhouse is a journalist and author, focusing on labor and the workplace, as well as economic and legal issues Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: The president’s approval rating with those under 30 has plummeted as he has failed to deliver on promise after promise Republicans rejoiced when far more young voters than expected backed Donald Trump in 2024, with many of them moved by Trump’s grandiose promises, such as his vow to “ build the greatest economy in the history of the world”. But Republicans should be alarmed that so many 18- to 29-year-olds have soured on Trump – his approval rating with that group has sunk from 48% in January 2025 to between just 25% and 33% in recent months , according to polls by YouGov/the Economist. It shouldn’t be a surprise that millions of young Americans have turned against Trump, considering that he has failed to deliver on so many promises, most notably his vow to reduce prices on day one . For young people, inflation is the No 1 economic issue , far outpacing other issues, and they very much wanted Trump to focus on affordability, but Trump has focused on everything but affordability. He’s focused instead on his glitzy, $400m ballroom , his war against Iran (which has increased gas prices ), and his tariff wars (which have increased overall inflation). In bad news for Republicans, 78% of Americans under age 30 disapprove of how Trump is handling inflation. Steven Greenhouse is a journalist and author, focusing on labor and the workplace, as well as economic and legal issues Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 根據最新民調，年輕美國人對特朗普的支持率大幅下降，從2025年1月的48%降至目前的25%至33%。這一變化主要源於特朗普未能兌現其承諾，尤其是在通脹問題上，年輕選民對其處理經濟的表現感到失望。儘管年輕選民曾對特朗普的宏大承諾抱有期待，但他們對其在通脹和生活成本上的無能為力感到不滿，78%的年輕選民不滿意特朗普對通脹的處理。
briefing.background: 特朗普在2024年選舉中獲得了意外的年輕選民支持，這使得共和黨對其未來的政治前景感到樂觀。然而，隨著通脹成為年輕選民最關心的經濟議題，特朗普未能專注於降低生活成本，反而將注意力放在其他議題上，導致年輕選民的支持率驟降。年輕選民的經濟壓力加劇，使得他們對特朗普的失望情緒加深，這對共和黨在即將到來的選舉中構成挑戰。
briefing.analysis: 年輕選民的支持率下降顯示出特朗普在經濟議題上的失誤，特別是在通脹問題上。根據參考報導，特朗普的施政表現將受到選民對經濟狀況的評價影響，這意味著如果生活成本持續上升，他的支持率可能會進一步下滑。共和黨需要重新評估其政策方向，以吸引年輕選民的支持，否則在未來的選舉中可能面臨更大的挑戰。參考報導強調了經濟狀況對選民投票行為的重要性，這與主新聞中年輕選民對通脹的關注相呼應，顯示出經濟議題在選舉中的關鍵性。

supporting_titles: Voters will judge Trump on the economy - how is it doing?
supporting_summaries: How much Donald Trump can do with the time he has left as president will depend massively on the cost of living.

economy.title: Could Iran’s escalating economic crisis weaken negotiating position with US?
economy.summary: War has combined with battered economy to leave Tehran wondering how hardline it can afford to be Iran may not be choking like a stuffed pig as Donald Trump predicted, but its economy is in serious difficulty as a combination of a massive war-damages bill, inflation, currency devaluation, unemployment and a contraction in oil revenues combine to leave the political elite worrying how hardline they can afford to be with their US negotiators. One estimate circulating in Iran’s media suggests the damage to the economy from the US-Israeli attacks is nine times the value of the Iranian budget last year. The UN Development Programme has estimated that 4.1 million more Iranians could fall into poverty. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: War has combined with battered economy to leave Tehran wondering how hardline it can afford to be Iran may not be choking like a stuffed pig as Donald Trump predicted, but its economy is in serious difficulty as a combination of a massive war-damages bill, inflation, currency devaluation, unemployment and a contraction in oil revenues combine to leave the political elite worrying how hardline they can afford to be with their US negotiators. One estimate circulating in Iran’s media suggests the damage to the economy from the US-Israeli attacks is nine times the value of the Iranian budget last year. The UN Development Programme has estimated that 4.1 million more Iranians could fall into poverty. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 伊朗面臨嚴重的經濟危機，這使得當地政治精英對於與美國的談判立場感到擔憂。隨著戰爭造成的巨大損失、通貨膨脹、貨幣貶值、失業率上升以及石油收入減少，伊朗的經濟狀況日益惡化。有報導指出，來自美國和以色列的攻擊造成的經濟損失，估計是伊朗去年預算的九倍。聯合國開發計劃署預測，將有410萬伊朗人可能陷入貧困。
briefing.background: 伊朗的經濟危機源於多重因素，包括國際制裁、內部政策失誤以及持續的軍事衝突。自特朗普政府實施制裁以來，伊朗的經濟受到重創，尤其是石油產業的萎縮影響了國家收入。隨著戰爭的加劇，伊朗的基礎設施和經濟體系遭受了進一步的損害，導致通脹飆升和貨幣貶值。這一系列問題使得伊朗政府在與美國的談判中，面臨更大的壓力和挑戰。
briefing.analysis: 伊朗的經濟困境使得其在與美國的談判中處於不利地位。根據主新聞，伊朗的政治精英擔心，過於強硬的立場可能會進一步惡化經濟狀況，這使得他們不得不重新考慮談判策略。參考報導1提到的美國對伊朗的攻擊使用了人工智慧技術，可能使得戰爭的影響更加深遠，進一步加劇了伊朗的經濟壓力。另一方面，參考報導2指出，中國正在幫助伊朗的革命衛隊從石油貿易中獲利，這可能為伊朗提供了一定的經濟支持，儘管整體經濟形勢依然嚴峻。未來，伊朗可能需要在國際關係中尋求更靈活的策略，以應對內外挑戰。

supporting_titles: How AI speeds 'kill chain' in US attacks on Iran
How Iran is making a mint from Donald Trump’s war

economy.title: Full charge: Xiaomi shares surge on EV sales boost
economy.summary: Shares of Xiaomi jumped in Hong Kong on Monday after the Chinese smartphone and electric-vehicle (EV) maker reported robust growth in its EV business, though analysts cautioned that broader headwinds could limit revenue upside. The stock rose as much as 11 per cent in early trade before closing 6.8 per cent higher at HK$30.98. Turnover reached HK$7.3 billion (US$931 million), placing it among the most actively traded counters on the city’s main board. The rally followed data showing Xiaomi’s EV...

The stock rose as much as 11 per cent in early trade before closing 6.8 per cent higher at HK$30.98. Turnover reached HK$7.3 billion (US$931 million), placing it among the most actively traded counters on the city’s main board. The rally followed data showing Xiaomi’s EV...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 小米的股價在香港大幅上漲，原因是該公司報告其電動車（EV）業務增長強勁。周一，小米的股價在早盤交易中上漲了11%，最終以30.98港元收盤，上漲6.8%。交易量達到73億港元（約9.31億美元），使其成為香港主要交易所中最活躍的股票之一。這一股價上漲的背景是小米的電動車業務數據顯示出良好的增長潛力。
briefing.background: 小米作為一家知名的智能手機製造商，近年來積極拓展其電動車業務，以應對市場競爭及多元化收入來源。隨著中國電動車市場的快速增長，許多科技公司都在尋求進入這一領域。小米的EV業務增長反映了其在這一新興市場中的潛力，儘管市場分析師警告，整體經濟環境和行業挑戰可能會限制其未來的收入增長。
briefing.analysis: 小米的股價上漲顯示出市場對其電動車業務的信心，然而分析師的警告也指出，宏觀經濟的不確定性及行業競爭可能會對其未來的表現造成壓力。這一情況可能使投資者在短期內看好小米的增長潛力，但長期而言，仍需密切關注市場動態及競爭對手的策略。此外，隨著中國政府對電動車產業的支持政策，這可能會進一步影響小米的市場表現及策略調整。

economy.title: Asia races to de-risk critical minerals supply chain with new financing tool
economy.summary: The Asian Development Bank (ADB) has launched a new financing facility aimed at strengthening critical mineral supply chains across the Asia-Pacific region, as a global push to loosen China’s chokehold over the sector continues. The initiative is designed to help Asia-Pacific nations move up the critical minerals value chain – moving beyond just mining – by equipping them with the technical capabilities to process and recycle the materials, according to the ADB. “Asia and the Pacific should be...

briefing.news_focus: The Asian Development Bank (ADB) has launched a new financing facility aimed at strengthening critical mineral supply chains across the Asia-Pacific region, as a global push to loosen China’s chokehold over the sector continues. The initiative is designed to help Asia-Pacific nations move up the critical minerals value chain – moving beyond just mining – by equipping them with the technical capabilities to process and recycle the materials, according to the ADB. “Asia and the Pacific should be...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 亞洲開發銀行（ADB）推出了一項新的融資工具，旨在加強亞太地區的關鍵礦產供應鏈，這是全球努力減少中國在該領域影響力的一部分。此舉旨在幫助亞太國家提升關鍵礦產的價值鏈，不僅限於採礦，還包括提供技術能力以進行材料的加工和回收。
briefing.background: 隨著全球對關鍵礦產需求的增加，特別是在電動車和可再生能源領域，亞洲地區面臨著對中國供應鏈依賴的挑戰。中國在全球關鍵礦產的開採和加工中佔據主導地位，這使得其他國家開始尋求多元化供應來源。亞洲開發銀行的這項新融資工具，旨在支持亞太國家在關鍵礦產的開發和利用上，提升自主能力，減少對中國的依賴，並促進地區經濟的可持續發展。
briefing.analysis: 亞洲開發銀行的這一舉措反映了亞太地區對於關鍵礦產供應鏈安全的高度重視。各國政府和企業可能會積極參與這項計劃，以獲得技術和資金支持，進而提升本地的產業能力。這不僅有助於減少對中國的依賴，還可能促進區域內的合作與競爭。然而，這一過程也可能面臨挑戰，包括技術轉移的難度、資金的有效分配以及市場需求的變化。隨著全球對於環保和可持續發展的重視，如何平衡經濟增長與環境保護將成為各國面臨的重要課題。
